coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 7:42 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0% done. 37 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/2. 12:00 at threshold. Get comfortable being uncomfortable.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 100% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First block. This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/2. 12:00 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting: 100% for 12:00. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 55% FTP, Seated. 8:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 8:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 8:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 100% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 100-100% FTP, 75-85 rpm. After this: 5min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 5min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 100% FTP, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 87% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 24min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 87% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 39 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
